problem text: Determine the remainder when $11^{2360}$ is divided by $50$.
problem solution: Observe that $11^5 = (10 + 1)^5 = 10^2 \cdot C + \binom{5}{1} \cdot 10^1 \cdot 1 + 1 = 10^2 C + 51$, where $C$ is a constant. We know $C$ is an integer since all other terms have a factor of $10^2$ or higher. Thus, $11^5$ leaves a remainder of $1$ when divided by $50$. Given $2360 = 5 \cdot 472$, the remainder of $(11^5)^{472}$ upon division by $50$ is $1^{472} = 1$.
